description: According to hotel policy, items left in the lost and found for over 90 days must be disposed of.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report of all items that have been in the lost and found for more than 90 days.

expected_outcome.value: A list of items to be disposed of is generated.

nodes.task_description: For each item on the list, update its status in the log to 'Disposed'.

expected_outcome.value: The status of all relevant items is updated.

nodes.task_description: Dispose of the physical items according to hotel policy (e.g., donate to charity, discard).

expected_outcome.value: The physical items are removed from storage.
